name: kdcube
description: Official KDCube plugins for coding agents — install and operate KDCube, and build apps (bundles) that run on it.

plugins.name: kdcube
plugins.description: Claude Code app builder for backend-plus-frontend AI apps as KDCube bundles: CLI runtime init, bundle registration/configuration, widgets/main UI, APIs, tools, jobs, integrations, testing, release, and an offline Tier 1 docs pack. Reads KDCube knowledge from the local kdcube-ai-app checkout, with the hosted docs MCP at https://kdcube.tech/mcp/docs as a live fallback.
